# Cross-Repo Pointer — out of vault scope, not flagged

A KB note routinely references the plugin repo, which lives OUTSIDE the
vault. Such a pointer resolves to no file at any in-vault candidate, so it
is out-of-scope and NOT a C2 finding:

see `skills/feature/SKILL.md` §Step 3 and also `agents/cross-auditor.md` §spec mode
